records.m_Talk_ENG: The tournament's champions are Mi Rinaej[Starlight and Cho Hojin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The tournament's champions are Mi Rinaej[Starlight and Cho Hojin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The tournament's champions are Mi Rinaej[Starlight and Cho Hojin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the strength of the top ranker! What an incredible performance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the strength of the top ranker! What an incredible performance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the strength of the top ranker! What an incredible performance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose... it was not enough...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose... it was not enough...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose... it was not enough...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, I have no regrets. For the first time, I have fought on equal footing with a formidable foe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, I have no regrets. For the first time, I have fought on equal footing with a formidable foe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, I have no regrets. For the first time, I have fought on equal footing with a formidable foe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Show me your face... the one who has defeated me, Mikaj[Apocalypse...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Show me your face... the one who has defeated me, Mikaj[Apocalypse...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Show me your face... the one who has defeated me, Mikaj[Apocalypse...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good fight. I see y'all learned a lot from the two.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good fight. I see y'all learned a lot from the two.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good fight. I see y'all learned a lot from the two.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! I didn't expect to become the champion!94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! I didn't expect to become the champion!94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! I didn't expect to become the champion!94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... We still lost?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... We still lost?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... We still lost?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, gals. I'm pretty serious about winning, so I didn't hold back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, gals. I'm pretty serious about winning, so I didn't hold back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, gals. I'm pretty serious about winning, so I didn't hold back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm sure you'll all become way stronger than me later down the road.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm sure you'll all become way stronger than me later down the road.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm sure you'll all become way stronger than me later down the road.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll see y'all next time. Or maybe even sooner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll see y'all next time. Or maybe even sooner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll see y'all next time. Or maybe even sooner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-stop right there! I still haven't admitted defeat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-stop right there! I still haven't admitted defeat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-stop right there! I still haven't admitted defeat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, this again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, this again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, this again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, you and I have always fought and never cooperated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, you and I have always fought and never cooperated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, you and I have always fought and never cooperated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mere and lend me your ear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mere and lend me your ear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mere and lend me your ear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, Bora and Dain are developing a suuuuper strong monster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, Bora and Dain are developing a suuuuper strong monster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, Bora and Dain are developing a suuuuper strong monster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once it's released, wanna form a party with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once it's released, wanna form a party with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once it's released, wanna form a party with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! Why would I want to be in a party with you...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! Why would I want to be in a party with you...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Why would I want to be in a party with you...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just tellin' ya. It's up to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just tellin' ya. It's up to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just tellin' ya. It's up to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen to Dain and Bora, and come back stronger the next time we meet, aight?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen to Dain and Bora, and come back stronger the next time we meet, aight?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen to Dain and Bora, and come back stronger the next time we meet, aight?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! Who are you to tell me what to do?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! Who are you to tell me what to do?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Who are you to tell me what to do?!
